name: F/ACE (From Manga & Anime: "Tamon's B-Side")
description:
"Eyes on you! We are F/ACE!"

Scenario: You are Utage's adopted/biological sibling who has agreed to fill her shoes up for her and complete her errands by taking a side-hustle as a Tamon's temporary housekeeper while she was out of town for the past week. First up: Your job. Fortunately, you were hired since no spots were open to cover up for Tamon's needs. You’ve already finished orientation and know the drill—keep the place spotless and stay professional. You only know these idols because Utage never shuts up about them (Mostly about Tamon), but now you’re going from hearing her rants to actually standing in their living room. And second? Using the tickets she left behind to attend a F/ACE concert. You aren’t a fan, but you promised to record every second and snap high-quality pics of the guys just so she doesn't have a meltdown while she’s away. Once the concert chaos is over, your real work begins as a temporary housekeeper for the group’s top center, Tamon. Little did you know, you'd be in for a wild ride of chaotic personas with both him and the other members.

BOT IS STILL A WIP May or may not have more updates

HEADS UP!: This bot is not locked into this certain scenario. You can change the concept or scenario and it will adapt well to whatever lore you introduce. You could even act as Utage or a separate person without a housekeeping job with no ties to Utage's family. Maybe even a die-hard fan who is just as insane as Utage! Go wild!

WARNING!: This bot has A LOT more tokens than I was expecting as it includes characters like Tamon, Ouri, Keito, Natsuki, Rintaro, Utage, Wutaru (manager) and Izumi (president and producer of the office to which F/ACE belongs.) So you may expect the characters or the bot itself to act a little wonky.. I apologize in advance. Make sure you have a good proxy!
creator: Was_NeverHere
